overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian urban environment mixing decaying traditional architecture with futuristic megastructures. The player navigates narrow alleys, crosses intersections with light traffic, and passes a gas station during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between weathered wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow pathway between old wooden structures and concrete buildings

entered.detail: dilapidated single-story wooden structure with rusted metal roof
tall multi-story concrete building with grid windows
piles of wooden crates and construction materials
tall palm tree rising above the buildings
distinctive turquoise-colored two-story building with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alleyway flanked by a weathered wooden shack on the left and stacks of crates on the right. The camera moves forward through the confined space, passing concrete buildings and palm trees, with the distinctive teal building becoming visible on the right as the pathway opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed old and new architecture

events.description: turns right from narrow alley onto wider city street with parked vehicles
turns left at the intersection toward the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the street, passing parked vehicles and turning left at the intersection

entered.detail: rusted pickup truck parked along the curb
two-story wooden house with front porch and stairs
elevated highway overpass structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley onto a wider city street, the camera passes parked trucks and turns left at the intersection. The weathered wooden house comes into view on the left while the overpass bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with gas station visible in distance

events.description: military truck passes through the intersection from left to right
crosses the intersection and enters sidewalk area with accumulated debris and graffiti

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while a large military truck passes by

notable_agents.action: military truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated sign displaying CHOOH2 fuel brand
fuel station with canopy and pumps visible in the distance
accumulated garbage bags and debris along the sidewalk
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art
metal barrel with fire burning inside

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the open intersection as a military truck passes through. The CHOOH2 gas station becomes visible in the distance while the foreground reveals a debris-filled sidewalk with graffiti walls and a burning barrel, indicating urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with accumulated trash approaching gas station

events.description: passing the burning barrel and trash piles while approaching the gas station

agents.ego_description: walking along the debris-filled sidewalk approaching the gas station forecourt

entered.detail: tall digital sign displaying fuel prices
green and yellow canopy covering the fuel pumps
fuel dispensing pumps under the canopy
covered market stalls with vendors on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the trash-strewn sidewalk, the camera approaches the gas station with its prominent CHOOH2 sign and fuel price display. The gas pumps come into view on the right while market stalls appear on the left, with the overpass visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with overpass ahead

events.description: passes the gas station and continues toward the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the fuel pumps and continuing down the street toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: figures standing near the market stalls on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: row of commercial storefronts with closed shutters

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the gas station, leaving the pumps and signage behind. Commercial buildings line the left side with market stalls and pedestrians visible, while the overpass bridge looms larger ahead as the camera continues down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic alleyway into a wider, open urban intersection. It begins by pushing forward through a narrow passage flanked by a weathered wooden shack and stacks of crates, passing concrete buildings and palm trees. As the pathway opens up, a distinctive teal building emerges on the right, signaling the transition out of the confined space. The camera then exits the alley onto a broader city street, gliding past parked trucks before turning left at the intersection. Finally, the view expands to reveal a weathered wooden house on the left and a distant overpass bridge looming ahead.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a decaying urban intersection toward the looming shadow of a city overpass. It begins by crossing an open intersection as a military truck passes, revealing a debris-filled sidewalk marked by graffiti and a burning barrel. As the camera advances along the trash-strewn path, the environment shifts toward a commercial hub where a CHOOH2 gas station with its prominent signage and fuel pumps emerges on the right. The scene then expands to include bustling market stalls and pedestrians lining the left side of the street. Finally, the camera moves past the gas station and its signage, continuing down the road as the massive overpass bridge looms larger overhead.
